method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: Creating 'Memory Under Machine Pressure' pushes me to explore the delicate balance between human experience and technological influence. I find myself constantly questioning how memories are shaped and distorted in our digitally dominated lives. This piece serves as a testament to the emotional weight we carry even as machines increasingly dictate our reality.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The juxtaposition of high-contrast elements against a muted counterweight captures the tension inherent in memory. By using structured layering, I aim to evoke a sense of depth that reflects the complexity of human emotions under pressure.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: lyrical, emotionally charged, symbolic. Primary medium language: digital collage with painterly textures. Core motifs: memory, tension, ritual. Arc context: Arc "Soft Catastrophes" step 4/4. Visual anchor directive: strong focal anchor with strong focal anchor. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: human meaning under machine pressure; counterpoint with human meaning under machine pressure. Evolution target: bold departure while preserving one recognizable motif. Deliberately avoid: flat lighting. Technique emphasis: structured layering + structured layering; avoid drifting into safe defaults. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Soft Catastrophes step 4/4: bold departure while preserving one recognizable motif.
